notes:
Singleplayer works just fine, but when joining a multiplayer server the game crashes with a socket error: NET_QueuePacket: WSAEADDRNOTAVAIL (for slightly more details look here: http://www.sockets.com/err_lst1.htm it's error 10049)

The sames goes for selfcreated multiplayer servers: It will create the server, but when it reaches the point where it joins the server, it crashes with this error.

The Motivation for getting Half-Life to work under proton is that it will enable playing many classic Half-Life mods through the Native Steam client, simply by extracting the installers into the Half-Life folder.
title: Half-Life
